description: triggerBlurSave sends unvalidated body containing control characters to Rust. handleEditorChange sets lastEditorBody = newBody (FeedRow.svelte:155) BEFORE calling validate_no_control_chars (line 156). If validation fails, the function returns at line 159, leaving lastEditorBody containing control characters. Later, when $effect cleanup fires triggerBlurSave (line 212), it sends lastEditorBody via invoke('trigger_blur_save', ...) at line 183-188 — bypassing the control-character pre-filter that only guards editor_update_note_body. This means control characters (U+0000-U+001F excluding tab, plus U+007F) can reach the Rust backend and potentially the file system through the blur save path, violating REQ-003.

secondaryEvidence.description: REQ-003 edge case: 'Paste of text containing control characters: Rejected same as typed input'
